title: Simple Teleporters Reforged
description: Simple Teleporters adds a craftable teleporter block to quickly travel your world!
body:
Simple Teleporters Reforged is a continuation of [Simple Teleporters](https://curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/simple-teleporters) by [Lemonszz](https://www.curseforge.com/members/lemonszz/projects). A lightweight teleportation mod that adds craftable teleporter blocks and portable teleportation items to quickly travel your world and across dimensions!

* * * * *

Features
--------

### Teleporter Block

-   Craft a teleporter block to create fixed teleportation points
-   Link teleporters using Ender Shards - sneak + right-click to bind a shard to a location
-   Step on a teleporter with a linked shard to instantly teleport
-   Dye teleporters any of the 16 colors by right-clicking with dye
-   Redstone controllable - trigger teleportation with a redstone signal
-   Can teleport any entity, not just players

### Ender Shard

-   Created by smelting an Ender Pearl in a furnace
-   Binds to teleporter locations when sneak + right-clicking on a teleporter
-   Craft an Ender Shard alone to clear its bound location

### Enhanced Ender Shard

-   Crafted by combining an Ender Shard with an Echo Shard (shapeless)
-   Enables **cross-dimensional teleportation** between the Overworld, Nether, and End
-   Perfect for linking bases across dimensions

### Hearth Crystal

-   Created by smelting an Ender Shard in a furnace
-   Portable personal teleporter - bind to any location (sneak + right-click on a block)
-   Right-click while holding to teleport back to your bound location
-   Has 20 charges that are consumed on each teleport
-   Recharge by crafting with an Ender Pearl
-   Location is stored per-player, so the crystal can be shared without losing your spot

* * * * *

Recipes
-------

### Ender Shard

Smelt an Ender Pearl to create an Ender Shard.

![Ender Shard Smelting](https://github.com/Mrbysco/SimpleTeleportersReforged/blob/1.21/meta/ender_shard_smelting.png?raw=true)

### Teleporter Block

![Teleporter Crafting](https://github.com/Mrbysco/SimpleTeleportersReforged/blob/1.21/meta/teleporter_crafting.png?raw=true)

### Hearth Crystal

Smelt an Ender Shard to create a Hearth Crystal.

![Hearth Crystal Crafting](https://github.com/Mrbysco/SimpleTeleportersReforged/blob/1.21/meta/hearthstone_crafting.png?raw=true)

### Other Recipes

-   **Enhanced Ender Shard**: Ender Shard + Echo Shard (shapeless)
-   **Clear Ender Shard**: Craft an Ender Shard alone to clear its bound location
-   **Recharge Hearth Crystal**: Hearth Crystal + Ender Pearl (shapeless)

* * * * *

How to Use
----------

**Setting up a Teleporter Network:**

1.  Smelt Ender Pearls to get Ender Shards
2.  Craft a Teleporter block and place it at your destination
3.  Sneak + right-click the Teleporter with an Ender Shard to link it
4.  Place another Teleporter at your starting location
5.  Put the linked Ender Shard in the Teleporter and step on it to teleport!

**Using the Hearth Crystal:**

1.  Smelt an Ender Shard to get a Hearth Crystal
2.  Sneak + right-click on any block to bind your home location
3.  Right-click while holding to teleport back home (uses 1 charge)
4.  Recharge by crafting with an Ender Pearl

**Cross-Dimensional Travel:**

1.  Craft an Enhanced Ender Shard (Ender Shard + Echo Shard)
2.  Use it like a regular Ender Shard to link teleporters across dimensions

* * * * *

Optional Mod Support
--------------------

-   **GuideME**: In-game documentation and guides
-   **JEI**: Recipe viewing support
